states.name: requested
states.description: Build Run is durable but not yet validated.
entry_requirements: Recipe Revision, acceptance, readiness and Activity references exist.

states.name: validating
states.description: Fresh acceptance/readiness/input/authority evidence is being checked.

states.name: compiling
states.description: Recipe is being translated or an existing Plan is being validated.

states.name: queued
states.description: Compiled Build waits for current dispatch eligibility/resources.

states.name: running
states.description: One or more Build Steps are executing.
entry_requirements: Exact Provider/Node generation and Attempt evidence exist.

states.name: cancelling
states.description: Cancellation requested; active steps/side effects are being reconciled.

states.name: cancelled
states.description: Run ended by cancellation with partial/uncertain outputs retained.
entry_requirements: Cancellation, cleanup and output disposition evidence exist.

states.name: partially_completed
states.description: Some declared Build outputs/steps completed while required Build scope did not fully complete.
entry_requirements: Completed and missing/failed scope are explicit.

states.name: build_completed
states.description: All required Build steps completed under the recorded Plan; later export/proof/release domains remain separate.
entry_requirements: Required step/Operation Receipts and produced output references exist.

states.name: failed
states.description: Build execution terminally failed before required Build scope completed.
entry_requirements: Typed failure and retained partial output evidence exist.

states.name: uncertain
states.description: A non-idempotent or externally finalized outcome is unresolved pending reconciliation.
entry_requirements: Exact Attempt/generation and uncertainty evidence exist.

required_preconditions: Distinct accepted Recipe Revision, Readiness, Plan intent and Activity exist.
Current policy/input/readiness evidence can be evaluated.
Recipe remains accepted and backend requirements are available.
Compiled Plan and fresh readiness exist.
Current dispatch eligibility, new Attempts and exact generations exist.
Some valid outputs exist and missing required Build scope is explicit.
Every required Build Step completed and output declarations are resolved.
Terminal failure and partial-output disposition are recorded.
An effect may have occurred and automatic retry is unsafe.
